Files

tai/env/
mod.rs

1// Phase 3: EnvContext and detect_all()
2
3use serde::Serialize;
4
5pub mod container;
6pub mod git;
7pub mod multiplexer;
8pub mod os;
9pub mod packages;
10pub mod remote;
11pub mod shell;
12pub mod tty;
13
14#[derive(Serialize, Debug)]
15pub struct EnvContext {
16    pub os: String,
17    pub os_version: Option<String>,
18    pub os_family: Option<String>,
19    pub kernel: Option<String>,
20    pub shell: String,
21    pub interactive: bool,
22    pub multiplexer: Option<String>,
23    pub remote: Option<String>,
24    pub container: Option<String>,
25    pub package_managers: Vec<String>,
26    pub cwd: Option<String>,
27    pub git_repo: bool,
28    pub git_branch: Option<String>,
29    pub git_dirty: Option<bool>,
30}
31
32/// Detect all environment context. This function is infallible.
33pub fn detect_all() -> EnvContext {
34    let os_info = os::detect();
35    let shell_name = shell::detect();
36    let interactive = tty::stdin_is_terminal();
37    let mux = multiplexer::detect();
38    let remote = remote::detect();
39    let container = container::detect();
40    let pkg_managers = packages::detect();
41    let cwd = std::env::current_dir()
42        .ok()
43        .map(|p| p.to_string_lossy().to_string());
44    let git_info = git::detect();
45
46    EnvContext {
47        os: os_info.os,
48        os_version: os_info.os_version,
49        os_family: os_info.os_family,
50        kernel: os_info.kernel,
51        shell: shell_name,
52        interactive,
53        multiplexer: mux,
54        remote,
55        container,
56        package_managers: pkg_managers,
57        cwd,
58        git_repo: git_info.git_repo,
59        git_branch: git_info.git_branch,
60        git_dirty: git_info.git_dirty,
61    }
62}
63
64#[cfg(test)]
65mod tests {
66    use super::*;
67
68    #[test]
69    fn detect_all_produces_valid_context() {
70        let ctx = detect_all();
71
72        // OS must be non-empty
73        assert!(!ctx.os.is_empty());
74
75        // Shell must be non-empty
76        assert!(!ctx.shell.is_empty());
77
78        // cwd should exist (we're running tests, so a cwd must exist)
79        assert!(ctx.cwd.is_some());
80
81        // We're running inside a git repo
82        assert!(ctx.git_repo);
83        assert!(ctx.git_branch.is_some());
84
85        // package_managers should be a Vec (even if empty)
86        // Just verify it's accessible
87        let _ = ctx.package_managers.len();
88    }
89
90    #[test]
91    fn env_context_serializes_to_json() {
92        let ctx = detect_all();
93        let json = serde_json::to_string(&ctx).expect("should serialize to JSON");
94        assert!(json.contains("\"os\""));
95        assert!(json.contains("\"shell\""));
96        assert!(json.contains("\"git_repo\""));
97        assert!(json.contains("\"package_managers\""));
98    }
99
100    #[test]
101    fn env_context_debug_fmt() {
102        let ctx = detect_all();
103        let debug_str = format!("{:?}", ctx);
104        assert!(debug_str.contains("EnvContext"));
105    }
106}
